3329480.name: VRCFaceTracking
3329480.description:
Unlock full face tracking on your avatars with VRCFT (VRChat Face Tracking)--a powerful, modular desktop application that unleashes face-tracking support from multiple VR headsets and trackers. Simply install VRCFT, choose the module(s) that apply to your hardware, and use a Unified Expression enabled avatar in VRChat.

Key Features

  • Integrates seamlessly with VRChat using OSC

  • Introduced the Unified Expression standard (142 supported blendshapes)

  • Works with a wide variety of free, paid, and custom avatars

  • Works with the Quest Pro, Vive Pro Eye, Vive Facial Tracker, and other popular hardware

  • Easy setup and light footprint

VRCFT is the go-to standard for adding face tracking to VRChat.
